---
name: Enhancement request
about: Request an enhancement for the application.
title: "[Enhancement]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''
type: Enhancement

---

**Enhancement Description**

A clear and concise description of what the the enhancement should be.

**Current Behavior**

Describe the current behavior and what should be enhanced (performance, user experience, etc.).

**Desired Behavior**

Describe the expected behavior after the enhancement had been applied.

**Acceptance Criteria**

List all the acceptance criteria for this Enhancement to be considered complete and functional.

**Developer Notes**

Add any notes the developer who takes this task should know before working on the Enhancement.

**Mockups (Only if applicable)**

Please attach any available mockups for new views or for updated ones.
